title: AI, Ambition and a Power Duo: Dave Stewart and Vanessa Amorosi Are Trail Blazers Together and Apart

content: It is 45 years since Stewart formed his unforgettable partnership with powerful Scottish vocalist Annie Lennox. The two produced so many iconic songs that defined the 1980s: “Sweet Dreams (Are Made Of This)”, “Love Is A Stranger”, “There Must Be An A... [6015 chars]

title: Govt initiates steps for establishment of Artificial Intelligence Mission
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Mar 5: The Government has initiated steps for establishing the Jammu & Kashmir Artificial Intelligence Mission (JK-AIM) to promote adoption of Artificial Intelligence and emerging technologies in governance across the Union Territory. A meeting in this regard was held under the chairmanship of Dr. Piyush Singla, Administrative Secretary, Information Technology Department, to deliberate on creating a structured institutional framework for enabling AI-based solutions in government functioning and public service delivery. During the meeting, the growing role of […]

title: GCW organizes lecture on AI and Internet of Things
description: Excelsior Correspondent KATHUA, Mar 5: A lecture on Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Internet of Things, organized by the Institutions Innovation Council (IIC) and Career Counseling and Placement Cell of Government Degree College for Women, was held here today. The resource person of the function was Sahil Badyal, Robotics Engineer at PHN Technology Pvt Ltd. Speaking on the occasion, Badyal said, “In recent years, two groundbreaking technologies have been making a profound impact on the world of technology and reshaping the […]

title: generated campaign content to carry disclaimer
description: Virginia lawmakers are taking steps to address the use of artificial intelligence in political campaigns.
content:
Virginia lawmakers are taking steps to address the use of artificial intelligence in political campaigns.
The state Senate passed SB141, 34-4, requiring political content created using AI to include a clear disclaimer that the material was generated ... [1198 chars]

title: UPDATE 2-US mulls new rules for AI chip exports, including requiring investments by foreign firms in the US

title: Trump: I 'Fired' Anthropic 'Like Dogs' Over Pentagon Dispute
description: Declaring the company is now in trouble, President Donald Trump said Thursday that he fired artificial intelligence company Anthropic like dogs after the firm refused to grant the Pentagon full access to its technology.
content:
President Donald Trump said Thursday that he "fired" artificial intelligence company Anthropic "like dogs" after the firm refused to grant the Pentagon full access to its technology, declaring the company is now "in trouble."

title: How AI is plugging in to doctor’s offices, emergency rooms
description: Artificial intelligence has bounded into the mainstream, into personal lives, classroom assignments and work meetings — so it should be no surprise to find it in doctors’ offices and emergency rooms, too.
content:
An extra set of eyes on radiology scans, double-checking for signs of prostate cancer. A green light telling surgeons when it’s safe to operate on trauma patients. A reminder system that finds and flags test results that need to be followed up on.
